payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Edge-cropped partial dark metal chair showing a circular, ringed backrest with several curved slats and a shadowed, occluded lower seat area; appears photographed close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m) in low indoor light.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark metal chair back, edge-cropped","long_description":"Edge-cropped partial dark metal chair showing a circular, ringed backrest with several curved slats and a shadowed, occluded lower seat area; appears photographed close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m) in low indoor light.","attributes":["dark metal","circular ring backrest","curved slats","partial/edge-cropped","occluded lower seat","shadowed/low light","indoor close view"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
